Creative Director = Alia Elena (XO House)

Extras: Saifful, Suzana, Amynanie

Verse
Syawal dah menjelang tiba
Tapi aku masih seorang saja
Bukannya tergesa-gesa
Cuma hati ingin rasa dicinta

Prechorus
Merayakan hari raya
Bersama insan tercinta
Yang penting nilai agama pada dirinya

Jemput-jemput datang rumahku
Singgahlah dulu jumpa orang tuaku
Jemput-jemput janganlah malu
Cari-carikan calon menantu

Jemput-jemput janganlah malu
Cari-carikan calon menantu

Bukan pada zahir rupa,
Yang terutama nilai pekertinya.
Jalinan yang ’kan tercipta,
Moga Yang Esa sudi menerima.

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

Lirik 'Yeye Raya' - Floor 88 & Odda

(Intro)
(Verse 1)
Di rumah sebelah ada jiran macam naga
Asal nampak nak bertengkar buat aku sakit kepala
Sedap betul mulut dia senang senang panggil kita naga
Dua kali lima takut takut terkahwin pula
Tak kuasa aku,bukan dia taste saya
Jangan cakap besar takut takut terjatuh cinta

(Verse 2)
Esok dah nak raya baik buat kuih raya
Baju raya dah siap tempah, tak sabarnya nak beraya
Duit raya pun dah tukar, semangat nya nak beraya
Esok ronda-ronda boleh kita cuci mata
Semua sudah sedia elok kita tidur saja
Jangan jadi orang sebelah solat raya pun membuta
Eh dia tak puas hati apa dia sakit hati sebab tahun lepas punya baju raya sama colour dengan langsir

(Chorus)
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita semua bergembira, (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa

(Verse 3)
Perut aku pun dah kenyang, habis makan ketupat dan rendang
Tiba tiba sedara datang, minta tolong hantarkan lemang
Kenapa raya pertama,waktu ini nak rosak pula
Nak mintak tolong,tolong,tolong pada siapa
Sedihnya aku rasa beginikah kisahnya
Kenapalah raya pertama
Nasib malang bertimpa timpa

(Verse 4)
Alamak ada perempuan, dok termenung di tepi jalan
Rupa rupa jiran sebelah, sakit hati malas nak layan
Tak sampai pula hati ini,nak tinggal dia kesorangan
Awak nak pergi mana mari abang hantarkan
Malu ku selama ini,hari hari gaduh dengannya
Eh kenapa hati ini, terasa berbunga bunga
Jemputlah malam nanti, ajaklah teman temanmu
Datang beraya rumah ku,bersama ayah dan ibu

(Chorus)
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna
Raya mari kita semua bergembira,
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita semua bergembira, (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa

(Outro)
Dengan teman,ibu bapa sanak saudara
Minta ampun kemaafan sesama kita
Selamat Hari Raya

snippet.title: 【預告解析】蜘蛛人:重生日-又有一堆隱藏角色?! | 超粒方 | Spiderman: Brand New Day
snippet.description:
🕷️ 蜘蛛人回來了，但這次的彼得帕克，比以往更孤獨、更危險。《蜘蛛人：重生日》首支預告揭露震撼劇情：在《無家日》之後，全世界都忘記了彼得的存在，他必須重新面對失去一切的人生，同時對抗全新的威脅——制裁者、手合會、甚至可能登場的變種人與琴葛雷！

這支影片將帶你完整解析預告中的關鍵細節：

蜘蛛人「變異失控」是否來自 Man-Spider 故事線？

MJ 與新角色「Paul」的關係暗示了什麼？

制裁者、夜魔俠與手合會如何串聯 MCU 街頭宇宙

Sadie Sink 的神秘角色，真的是琴葛雷嗎？

這部電影如何鋪陳《復仇者聯盟5：末日崛起》

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Billie Eilish - WILDFLOWER (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Billie Eilish - WILDFLOWER (Lyrics)
Billie Eilish - WILDFLOWER 
i see her in the back of my mind all the time lyrics     

Stream:-  
https://open.spotify.com/track/3QaPy1KgI7nu9FJEQUgn6h?si=f579c5a69c65454b 



Follow Billie Eilish:
https://www.tiktok.com/@billieeilish
https://www.instagram.com/billieeilish
https://music.youtube.com/channel/UCERrDZ8oN0U_n9MphMKERcg?feature=gws_kp_artist&feature=gws_kp_artist




Lyrics:- 
[Verse 1]
Things fall apart
And time breaks your heart
I wasn't there, but I know
She was your girl
You showed her the world
But fell out of love and you both let go


[Pre-Chorus]
She was cryin’ on my shoulder
All I could do was hold her
Only made us closer until July
Now, I know that you love me
You don't need to remind me
I should put it all behind me, shouldn't I?


[Chorus]
But I see her in the back of my mind all the time
Like a fever, like I’m burning alive, like a sign
Did I cross the line?


[Post-Chorus]
(Mm) Hmm

[Verse 2]
Well, good things don't last (Good things don't last)
And life moves so fast (Life moves so fast)
I'd never ask who was better (I'd never ask who was better)
'Cause she couldn't be (Couldn't)
More different from me (Different)
Happy and free in leather (Happy)

[Pre-Chorus]
And I know that you love me (You love me)
You don’t need to remind me (Remind me)
Wanna put it all behind me, but baby


[Chorus]
I see her in the back of my mind (Back of my mind) all the time (All the time)
Feels like a fever (Like a fever), like I’m burning alive (Burning alive), like a sign
Did I cross the line?


[Bridge]
You say no one knows you so well (Oh)
But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt
Valentine's Day, cryin’ in the hotel
I know you didn't mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself


[Chorus]
And I wonder
Do you see her in the back of your mind in my eyes?


[Outro]
You say no one knows you so well
But every time you touch me, I just wonder how she felt
Valentine's Day, cryin' in the hotel
I know you didn’t mean to hurt me, so I kept it to myself

snippet.title: Syasya Rizal - Inikan Hari Raya (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
XO House Presents
Syasya Rizal - Inikan Hari Raya (Official Music Video) 

Executive Producer = Adib Hamdi (XO House)
Creative Director = Alia Elena (XO House)

Composer: Amirul Azhar, Amir Firdaus & Syasya Rizal
Lyricist: Amirul Azhar, Amir Firdaus & Syasya Rizal
Music Producer: Amirul Azhar
Arranger: Amirul Azhar
Mix & Master: Amirul Azhar
Publishing: XO House Publishing

Director + DOP = Atixxe (XO House) 
Production Manager + Wardrobe = Nadia Bakar (XO House)
Assist Production Manager + Assist Wardrobe = Badriatul (XO House)
Editor + Colorist = Naim Arman (XO House)
Lighting Dept = Sarawanan, Prakash
Art Dept = Rabindranath, Satheeshwaren 
BTS = Jazly (XO House)

MUA: Ati Harun
Hijab Stylist: Shida Malek

Choreographer = Aus
Dancers = Nadsukarno, Ija, Racoon, Dian Batriesya

Extras = Abg Shook, Min Zahrun, Rashimah, Maziah, Ralph, Umar, Aira


Lyrics - Inikan Hari Raya

[Verse 1]
Bila hari raya,
Janganlah tamak haloba,
Dalam bergembira,
Biarlah berpada.

[Pre-chorus]
Oh tak kesah,
Baju lama,
Asalkan masih boleh beraya,
Bersyukur sentiasa.

[Chorus]
Salam lebaran pada semua,
Dengan senyuman dan juga tawa,
Meriahkan suasana,
Inikan hari raya.

Raikan dengan sanak saudara,
Yang berkunjung datang tak dilupa,
Penuh riang gembira,
Indahnya hari raya.

[Verse 2]
Oh sudah tiba,
Hari yang dinanti,
Confirm riuh semua kumpul sekali.

Makcik yang belah sana,
Sepupu yang belah sini,
Pak long pak ngah pun ada,
Eh memang kecoh sekali.

Beraya hujung ke hujung kampung,
Semua rumah kalau boleh memang nak dikunjung,
Yang tampan dan segak datang berbaju melayu,
Yang cantik pula berbaju kurung.

[Pre-chorus]
Oh tak kesah,
Baju lama,
Asalkan masih boleh beraya,
Bersyukur sentiasa.

[Chorus]

Dengan senyuman dan juga tawa,
Meriahkan suasana,
Inikan hari raya.

Raikan dengan sanak saudara,
Yang berkunjung datang tak dilupa,
Penuh riang gembira,
Indahnya hari raya.

[Chorus]
Salam lebaran pada semua,
Dengan senyuman dan juga tawa,
Meriahkan suasana,
Inikan hari raya.

Raikan dengan sanak saudara,
Yang berkunjung datang tak dilupa,
Penuh riang gembira,
Indahnya hari raya.

Hari raya,
Ooh,
Indahnya hari raya.
